title: Pipeline
description: Configures a complete STT → LLM → TTS voice AI pipeline with integrated turn detection. Provides a higher-level abstraction than manually orchestrating the individual components. Optimized for building voice AI agents with proper turn-taking behavior.

id.description: An optional unique identifier for this verb instance.

oneOf.description: Turn detection strategy shorthand. 'stt' uses the STT vendor's native signals (silence-based for most vendors; acoustic+semantic for deepgramflux, assemblyai, speechmatics). 'krisp' uses the Krisp acoustic end-of-turn model with default settings.
Turn detection configuration with tunable parameters.

mode.description: Turn detection mode. Currently only 'krisp' supports object-form tuning.

threshold.description: Krisp end-of-turn confidence threshold (0.0–1.0). Lower values trigger earlier turn transitions. Default: 0.5

turnDetection.description: Turn detection strategy. Controls when the pipeline decides the user has finished speaking. STT vendors with native turn-taking (deepgramflux, assemblyai, speechmatics) always use their built-in detection regardless of this setting.

bargeIn.description: Controls whether and how the user can interrupt the assistant while it is speaking.

enable.description: Allow the user to interrupt the assistant while it is speaking. Default: true.

minSpeechDuration.description: Seconds of detected speech required before confirming an interruption. Prevents brief noises from cutting off the assistant. Default: 0.5

sticky.description: If true, once the user interrupts the assistant does not resume speaking. Default: false.

llm.description: LLM configuration for the pipeline. See the 'llm' verb schema for details.

actionHook.description: A webhook invoked when the pipeline ends.

eventHook.description: A webhook invoked for pipeline events.

toolHook.description: A webhook invoked when the LLM requests a tool/function call. The payload includes the tool name and arguments; the response provides the tool result.

messages.content: You are a helpful voice assistant.
You are a helpful voice assistant.
